notes: Outcome milestone #15 — 2 external data partners indexed; due 2026-06-30.
Epic #465. Outcome requires ≥1 attestation per partner per week in a Season One pilot garden over a rolling 2-week window.
Indexer boundary is non-negotiable: EAS attestations are queried directly at render time (per CLAUDE.md) and never re-indexed into Envio.
Green Goods trusted attester signs all ExternalVerification attestations; partners never sign directly.
Badges are advisory in Q2 — they do NOT block operator approvals. Blocking logic is out of scope.

ui.handoff_note: packages/admin/src/components/WorkReview/VerificationBadges.tsx — 3-tier badge (green/yellow/red) consuming useWorkAttestations. Admin surface only; no client changes this hub.

state_api.handoff_note: PartnerAdapter interface + sylvie.ts + locale.ts + attestationWriter.ts + partnerPoller.ts + api/verification.ts + shared useWorkAttestations + modules/partners.ts. Direct EAS queries (no Envio touch).

contracts.handoff_note: No new Solidity. EAS ExternalVerification schema registration is a deployment-artifact step handled inside state_api deployment flow.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Chrome MCP spot-check of VerificationBadges across 3 tiers + error state; 1-week attestation-cadence evidence from pilot garden.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Poller idempotency under duplicate-volley load; indexer-boundary grep proof; outcome milestone #15 evidence validation.

history.note: Hub created from superpowers spec + plan. Epic #465; outcome milestone #15. Decisions locked: automated verification gate (advisory), we pull from partner APIs (no push), Sylvie + locale.network as Q2 partners, Green Goods as trusted attester, EAS attestations NOT re-indexed.
brief.md + eval.md + status.json scaffolded; spec.md migrated from docs/superpowers/specs/ (legacy folder deleted). plan.todo.md spec link rewired to ./spec.md. plan-hub.mjs validate green.
